result.stdout:
Description:
  Copilot Studio MCP Server Proxy - A proxy server for using Microsoft Copilot Studio as a MCP server

Usage:
  Microsoft.Agents.CopilotStudio.Mcp [options]

Options:
  --remote-server-url <remote-server-url> (REQUIRED)  URL of the Copilot Studio agent
  --client-id <client-id>                             OAuth client ID for authentication (optional)
  --tenant-id <tenant-id>                             Azure AD tenant ID (optional, defaults to common endpoint)
  --authority <authority>                             OAuth authority URL (optional, defaults to common endpoint)
  --scopes <scopes>                                   OAuth scopes (eg. https://api.powerplatform.com/.default)
  --debug                                             Enable debug mode
  --enable-http-logging                               Enable HTTP request/response logging
  --enable-msal-logging                               Enable MSAL authentication logging
  --enable-logging                                    Enable raw MCP traffic logging to file
  --request-timeout <request-timeout>                 HTTP request timeout in seconds [default: 30]
  --user-agent <user-agent>                           Custom User-Agent header
  --additional-headers <additional-headers>           Additional HTTP headers in format key=value
  --version                                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
